heading: Captains Flat vs Caragabal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Captains Flat, New South Wales and Caragabal, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Captains Flat and Caragabal have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Captains Flat or Caragabal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Captains Flat has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Caragabal scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Captains Flat scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Caragabal scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Captains Flat or Caragabal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Captains Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
